audit_note: No external audit completed. All compliance items are internal self-assessments.

checks.description: Component root must be a <button> element.
type='button' must always be set to prevent accidental form submission.
Icon-only FAB must have an accessible name via aria-label or aria-labelledby.
checks.notes: Contract section 6 requires aria-label for icon-only mode. All icon-only template examples include aria-label.
fab__icon has aria-hidden='true' in all template examples.

checks.description: All six Figma states (Default, Hovered, Focused, Pressed, Disabled, Selected) must be implemented.
checks.notes: All states implemented via CSS selectors. See floating-button.css.

checks.description: Disabled state must use the 'disabled' HTML attribute or aria-disabled='true'.
checks.notes: Both [disabled] and [aria-disabled='true'] selectors are supported in CSS.

checks.description: Focus indicator must be visible and meet WCAG 2.2 Focus Appearance requirements.
checks.notes: Focus ring: 3px solid, extends 5px beyond button. Color: --fab-focus-ring-color (--gray-950 = #0D121C). On white/light backgrounds: contrast ratio ~19:1 (pass). On dark page backgrounds: potentially insufficient. Risk documented in analysis.md.

checks.description: Disabled state must not receive keyboard focus.
checks.notes: The 'disabled' attribute natively prevents focus. aria-disabled='true' relies on CSS pointer-events: none and JS prevention — documented in contract.

checks.description: Interactive element must have a minimum touch target of 44×44px.
checks.notes: Small size diameter: 56px (icon 24px + padding 16px×2). Passes. The touch target is the button itself; no additional wrapper needed.

checks.description: Component CSS must use component-level semantic tokens, not raw primitives.
checks.notes: Component selectors use --fab-* and --_fab-* (local) tokens only. Provisional :root block maps --fab-* to primitives. Block must be migrated to token.css.

checks.description: No hardcoded hex or rgba values in component selectors.
checks.notes: All component selectors use var(--fab-*) or var(--_fab-*). rgba values exist only in the provisional :root token definition block.

checks.description: State deltas must be CSS selectors, not duplicated HTML markup.
checks.notes: All six states are CSS-selector driven. No duplicated markup.

checks.description: Focus ring must not be removed or suppressed by non-focus states.
checks.notes: Focus ring (::after) is only suppressed during :active and [disabled] — both intentional per Figma.

checks.description: Component must support all three style variants (primary-neutral, primary-brand, secondary-solid).
checks.notes: All three styles implemented. primary-neutral is default. primary-brand: .fab--primary-brand. secondary-solid: .fab--secondary-solid.

checks.description: Component must support on-color context modifier.
checks.notes: .fab--on-color modifier implemented. Works independently and combined with style modifiers.

checks.description: Component must support both size variants (small, large).
